title: Trump: only US and China have capability to retrieve enriched uranium from Iran
snippet: President Trump stated that only the United States and China have the capability to retrieve enriched uranium from Iran, signaling potential US-China cooperation on the nuclear component of any Iran deal. The comment came amid ongoing negotiations over the 60-day MoU framework, where the fate of Iran's enriched uranium stockpile remains a core sticking point.
tag_reason: New Trump statement on nuclear issue on June 5. Not in previous sources.
